backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a car marketplace, with CRUD operations for car listings, callback requests, booking/receipt submission, and booking record queries using stable Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—an Admin Dashboard page at '/admin' with three tabbed tables, and an Admin nav link—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (Home, Listings, ListingDetail, SellCar, ResaleValueChecker, VehicleLookup, AdminDashboard) wrapped in a shared Navbar/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/BookingModal.tsx: Modal component for booking a car that displays Axis Bank payment details with copy buttons, a file upload for payment receipts, and shows a success confirmation screen after receipt submission.
frontend/src/components/CallbackRequestF: A collapsible card form that lets users submit a callback request (name, phone, preferred time slot) for a specific car listing, using a mutation hook and displaying success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: A linked card component that displays a car listing's image, price, fuel type, mileage, year, and badges (sold, booked, 360°) in a grid-friendly format.
frontend/src/components/CarImageViewer36: An interactive 360° image viewer that supports mouse and touch drag to cycle through a sequence of car images, with prev/next buttons and a loading state.
frontend/src/components/EmiCalculator.ts: A collapsible EMI calculator that takes a car's asking price and lets users adjust down payment, interest rate, and tenure via sliders/selects to compute monthly installment, total payable, and total interest.
frontend/src/components/FinanceOptions.t: A tabbed card displaying indicative loan rates from banks and NBFCs, with individual lender cards that trigger a toast enquiry action when the Apply button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, popular car brands, contact details for the owner, and a helpline section.
frontend/src/components/LocationFilter.t: A two-level location filter component with state and city dropdowns, resetting the city selection when the state changes and supporting a compact display mode.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile (hamburger) menus, active-link highlighting, and a 'List Your Car' CTA button linking to the sell page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functions, identity state, and status flags, backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching, filtering, and creating car listings, booking cars, and submitting callback requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed views for callback requests, booking records, and all listings, displaying summary stat cards and sortable data tables with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero section with location filter and search bar, a featured listings grid filtered by state/city, popular makes quick-links, and platform stats.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single car listing showing an image gallery, 360-viewer, car specs, booking modal, EMI calculator, finance options, and a callback request form.
frontend/src/pages/Listings.tsx: Browse/search page for all car listings with multi-criteria filters (make, fuel type, transmission, price range, location) and sort options, rendering results as CarCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ResaleValueChecker.ts: Tool page where users input car details (make, model, year, mileage, fuel type, city) to get an estimated resale value with factor breakdown using a local resale calculator utility.
frontend/src/pages/SellCar.tsx: Multi-step form page (2 steps) for creating a car listing, collecting vehicle details and seller info, with validation and submission via the useCreateListing hook.
frontend/src/pages/SellCarConfirmation.t: Confirmation page shown after a car listing is successfully submitted, displaying the listing ID and next-step instructions with navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/VehicleLookup.tsx: Page that lets users search for a car listing by registration number, displaying full vehicle specs and masked seller phone number if found.
frontend/src/utils/emiCalculator.ts: Utility functions for calculating monthly EMI, total payable amount, total interest, and formatting INR currency values.
frontend/src/utils/locationData.ts: Static data file exporting a comprehensive list of Indian states and their cities, plus a Pan India constant, used for location selection across the app.
frontend/src/utils/phoneNumberMasker.ts: Utility function that masks a phone number by showing only the first 4 digits followed by six asterisks.
frontend/src/utils/resaleCalculator.ts: Utility that estimates a used car's resale value based on make, model, age, mileage, fuel type, transmission, and city, returning a price range with contributing factors.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Autohub frontend, defining dark mode, custom colors (oklch-based), typography, border radius, box shadows, animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state document (version 15) describing Autohub, a used car marketplace, including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and requirements for listings, booking, admin dashboard, and integrations.
